description: RAG-Anything v1.2.10 baseline on WHO Life Expectancy

path_a.method: RAG-Anything insert() with CSV as plain text (equivalent to LightRAG ainsert)

path_b.method: TableModalProcessor direct analysis of CSV table content
path_b.observation: TableModalProcessor extracts macro-level trends (Developed-Developing Gap, Pre-2020 Upward Trend) but does NOT preserve subject-time-value cell-level bindings

comparison.conclusion: RAG-Anything exhibits structural blindness on statistical CSV data regardless of processing path. TableModalProcessor produces high-level summaries, not structured fact bindings.
